description: List shared folders on SMB/Windows hosts

description: Brute-force DNS subdomains

description: Check if FTP allows anonymous login

name: http-enum
description: Enumerate common web directories and files

name: http-sql-injection
description: Test for SQL injection in web parameters

name: http-robots.txt
description: Fetch and display robots.txt contents

name: banner
description: Grab service banners from open ports

name: default
description: Run nmap's default safe script set

name: auth
description: Run all authentication-related scripts

name: broadcast
description: Discover hosts via broadcast protocols (mDNS, SSDP)

name: mysql-info
description: Get MySQL server version and capabilities

name: whois-ip
description: Look up WHOIS info for target IP addresses

name: traceroute-geolocation
